hero.description: Rashad is Rubix's flagship internal intelligence platform designed to support the consulting lifecycle end-to-end by combining AI agents, structured knowledge, workflow automation, and decision support into a connected system that enables faster opportunity assessment, RFP understanding, knowledge retrieval, proposal generation, delivery acceleration, project mobilization, and continuous institutional learning.

trustedOrganizations.title: Trusted by Leading Organizations
trustedOrganizations.subtitle: Government entities, enterprises, and consulting teams rely on Rubix solutions to deliver structured, high-quality proposals and strategic outcomes.

howRashadWorks.title: How Rashad Works
howRashadWorks.subtitle: Your complete workflow from opportunity intake to continuous learning
howRashadWorks.step1Desc: Captures opportunity inputs, client requirements, and project parameters from documents or structured forms.
howRashadWorks.step2Desc: Extracts, structures, and interprets scope, deliverables, timelines, evaluation criteria, and resource implications.
howRashadWorks.step3Desc: Pulls from Rubix templates, prior work, methodologies, credentials, and reusable content to build a smarter working base.
howRashadWorks.step4Desc: Supports the creation of technical responses, pricing logic, presentation content, and submission-ready materials.
howRashadWorks.step5Desc: Helps teams align roles, resources, priorities, and startup requirements once an opportunity moves forward.
howRashadWorks.step6Desc: Provides consultants with agent-based assistance throughout execution to improve speed, structure, and quality.
howRashadWorks.step7Desc: Captures lessons learned, reusable logic, and institutional knowledge to continuously strengthen future work.

videoShowcase.title: See Rashad in Action
videoShowcase.subtitle: Watch how Rashad transforms the consulting workflow — from RFP analysis to proposal generation and project mobilization.

smartAgents.title: Powered by Smart AI Agents
smartAgents.subtitle1: Each agent handles a specific part of the consulting workflow.
smartAgents.subtitle2: Think of them as expert team members, each with a focused responsibility, working together in a coordinated sequence to produce the final output.
smartAgents.agent1Desc: When a user uploads an RFP or any project document (PDF, Word, scanned files), this engine automatically reads the document, extracts key information — such as project scope, requirements, timelines, and evaluation criteria — and organizes it into a structured format that Rashad can work with.
smartAgents.agent2Summary: Generates project summaries and identifies key insights
smartAgents.agent2Desc: After the Document Intelligence Engine extracts the data, this agent analyzes the structured information and generates a concise project summary. It highlights the most important requirements, flags potential risks, identifies key client expectations, and surfaces critical deadlines.
smartAgents.agent3Summary: Connects users to Rubix's internal knowledge base
smartAgents.agent3Desc: This agent searches Rubix's library of past proposals, methodologies, templates, case studies, and institutional knowledge to find relevant information for the current project. It recommends applicable frameworks, reusable content, and successful approaches from similar past engagements.
smartAgents.agent4Desc: This is Rashad's core output engine. It takes the structured project data, the AI summary, and the knowledge base recommendations, then generates a complete technical and financial proposal. The output follows Rubix's standards for structure, tone, formatting, and content quality.
smartAgents.agent5Summary: Continuously improves Rashad through feedback and outcomes
smartAgents.agent5Desc: Continuously improves Rashad through feedback and outcomes.
smartAgents.agent6Summary: Converts consultant CVs into structured profiles
smartAgents.agent6Desc: When proposals require team member profiles, this agent takes consultant CVs and transforms them into standardized professional profiles. It extracts relevant experience, qualifications, and project history, then formats them according to Rubix's proposal standards.
smartAgents.agent7Summary: Assists during project mobilization and execution
smartAgents.agent7Desc: Once a bid is won, these agents help with the transition from proposal to active project. They assist with team mobilization planning, resource allocation, project kickoff preparation, and early-stage delivery support.
smartAgents.agent8Desc: Transforms content into executive-ready narratives, slides, and key messages for stakeholder communication.

whatRashadCanDo.title: What Rashad Can Do
whatRashadCanDo.subtitle: Rashad simplifies the entire proposal lifecycle — from understanding the RFP to generating proposals and preparing project mobilization.

cta.title: One Platform - Full Consulting Lifecycle
cta.subtitle:
Rashad connects every step of the consulting lifecycle into a single, structured flow.
From opportunity intake to project delivery, helping teams stay focused, consistent, and ready to execute.

footer.description: Rashad Engine helps consulting teams analyze RFPs, generate structured proposals, and prepare project plans in minutes — not days.
